front: What is the GlycoFi technology for glycoengineered peptides?
back: GlycoFi (Merck) engineers yeast (Pichia pastoris) to produce human-like glycosylation patterns. Glycoengineering involves: 1) Knocking out yeast-specific glycosyltransferases, 2) Expressing human glycosylation enzymes, 3) Producing homogeneous, human-type glycans on therapeutic peptides/glycoproteins.
